# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: projects/myprojectid/locations/us-central1/subnetworks/*networkName*
    type: "compute.v1.network"
    properties: {}
  
variables:
  subnets_regexp: '^(?!subnet).+' # Regular expression for non-"main" network (auto-create) names in GCP auto create mode, e.g., vpc-us-central1a or something similar... TODO use real name instead of this placeholder
  subnets_values: []
